description_long: This property features two modern, boxy houses set within a walled lot, each with flat roofs and large windows. The houses are separated by a central driveway and landscaped with palm trees, shrubs, and manicured lawns. At the rear of the lot, a spacious swimming pool with integrated lounge areas and sunbeds is surrounded by green space and additional seating. The exterior walls are finished in a combination of white and gray, with wood accents near the entryways. The houses have multiple balconies and terraces, providing outdoor living spaces. The overall design is clean, geometric, and emphasizes open, communal outdoor areas.
description: A pair of modern, flat-roofed houses with large windows, wood accents, and a shared backyard pool, set within a landscaped, walled lot.
description_view_0: Front view showing the two houses, central driveway, landscaped entry, and main doors.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the pool area, sunbeds, and the rear terraces of the houses.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the large swimming pool, sun loungers, and the back facades of both houses.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the pool, side balconies, and the driveway leading to the houses.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and balcony doors
attribute_entryway_design: Recessed entryways with wide steps, minimal overhangs, and wood accent panels
